reasoning_summary: Even at the optimistic 7% uplift, net benefit after monthly AI costs is only $26k, yielding a payback of ~7 months, which meets the 12‑month requirement. However, at the low 3% uplift the project loses $6k per month, never recouping the $180k implementation expense. Given the wide uncertainty and risk of failing the payback target, the project should not be approved.
key_assumptions: Revenue uplift applies to full monthly revenue of $2M.
Gross margin of 40% converts uplifted revenue to incremental gross profit.
AI infrastructure ($22k) and maintenance ($8k) are incurred each month after go-live.
Implementation cost of $180k is a one‑time expense, incurred before go-live.
No incremental benefit during the 3‑month implementation period.
Payback period calculated using monthly net benefit post‑go-live.
